---
title: Tea party
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808236/20251231_084800_uqvt19.jpg
description: Un fête du thé
categories: ["children illustration"]
date: 2026-01-05
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808236/20251231_084800_uqvt19.jpg)
